typography.tracking: tracking-tight for headings, tracking-normal for body
typography.weight_contrast: font-light to font-medium for headings, font-normal for body

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: The Bento Grid Protocol - Mode A for Marketing/Categories, Mode B for Admin Panel
spacing_and_layout.container_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px) to keep it edgy and luxury

surfaces.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow. Hover: slight lift, border color changes to gold (#C5A059/50)
surfaces.headers: Crystal Glass - bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5
surfaces.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-none), high contrast. Primary buttons: bg-[#C5A059] text-black hover:bg-[#B38D46]
surfaces.inputs: bg-transparent border-b border-border rounded-none focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 px-0 rounded-none shadow-none

components.buttons: Shadcn button customized to remove radius, add gold hover effects.
components.inputs: Minimalist underline inputs instead of boxed. Overrride Shadcn defaults.
components.dialog: Dark glassmorphism overlay, minimal borders, #0F0F0F background.
components.tables: Admin panel tables should have border-b only, no vertical borders. minimalist.

hero_background.description: man in black hat and white t-shirt
hero_background.placement: Hero section banner on main landing page

virtual_tryon_placeholder.description: Model silhouette for virtual try-on scan
virtual_tryon_placeholder.placement: Virtual Try-On landing or scanner UI background

product_placeholder.description: black crew neck shirt on hanger
product_placeholder.placement: Product catalog placeholder when printful API fails or loading

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Playfair Display for headings and Manrope for body text. Add the google_fonts_url to index.html.
Implement a dark theme using the provided colors. Ensure all backgrounds are #050505 and accents use the gold color #C5A059.
Use generous padding (p-12 to p-24) to create a luxurious, spacious feel. Don't cramp elements.
Apply 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements for robust testing.
Ensure the hero section uses the provided hero background image with a dark gradient overlay.
For the virtual try-on UI, focus on a futuristic yet minimalist scanner animation using framer-motion.
Use sharp edges (rounded-none) for cards and buttons. Luxury feels intentional and sharp, not overly soft and bubbly.
Headers should be sticky glassmorphism (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5).
For the Admin panel, use a dense Grid Mode B layout, maintaining the dark luxury aesthetic.
Never use generic placeholder images like via.placeholder.com. Use the provided media assets.
Modify Shadcn tailwind.config.js to use the exact hsl colors equivalent to the hex codes provided here.
